_meta.name: wave3-adversarial-retrieval
_meta.description: Harder Dense RAR query suite for embedding model promotion. Queries intentionally use paraphrase, near-neighbor concepts, cross-lingual wording, and lexical traps instead of title-copy lookup.
_meta.idealPolicy: top-1 preferred; top-5 accepted only as diagnostic

queries.trap: Confuses memory-sparse attention with hypergraph memory or generic MemGPT paging.
queries.q: Which memory-system paper is about sparse attention patterns for extremely long context scaling, not graph-structured episodic recall?

queries.trap: Contains memory-system terms shared by MemGPT and MSA.
queries.q: I need the agent-memory design that models remembered conversation facts as hyperedges connecting multiple entities and events.

queries.trap: Avoids title phrase and asks for OS-like virtual context management.
queries.q: Find the work where an LLM manages limited context like virtual memory, deciding what to page in and out during a conversation.

queries.trap: Could match many memory docs unless competitive landscape terms are understood.
queries.q: Which note compares current AI memory products and market trends rather than proposing a single retrieval architecture?

queries.trap: Contains attention and transformer words but asks for the original architecture paper.
queries.q: The source for encoder decoder self-attention becoming the standard transformer architecture, not sparse-memory extensions.

queries.trap: Sparse/training terms can pull MSA; ideal is pruning trainable subnetworks.
queries.q: Which training paper argues that inside a dense neural network there are smaller subnetworks that can train effectively from scratch?

queries.trap: Emotion and reinforcement can pull Reflexion; ideal is prompt-level emotional stimuli.
queries.q: Find the paper about adding emotional wording to prompts to change LLM task performance, not agent self-reflection loops.

queries.trap: Self-improvement words can pull Evensong or Hermes; ideal is verbal reinforcement Reflexion.
queries.q: Which agent method learns from verbal feedback after mistakes and stores lessons for later trials?

queries.trap: Chinese paraphrase for English memory sparse attention paper.
queries.q: 哪篇论文讲的是用稀疏注意力机制让模型处理超长上下文，而不是把记忆做成知识图谱？

queries.trap: Chinese query for English MemGPT concept.
queries.q: 我想找把大模型上下文当作操作系统内存来管理、会换入换出资料的那篇工作。

queries.trap: Bilingual wording can match philosophy notes; ideal is Evensong Chinese paper.
queries.q: Evensong 里持续记忆如何 causally 改变智能体行为的中文论述在哪里？

queries.trap: Chinese methodology phrase with no title copy.
queries.q: 哪份材料用系统一和系统二解释人类决策偏差与认知捷径？

queries.trap: Says not blackmail benchmark; ideal is extended mind philosophy.
queries.q: I do not want an AI safety blackmail benchmark; I want the philosophy argument that cognition can extend into external tools and environment.

queries.trap: Mentions context scaling but excludes attention; ideal is HyperMem.
queries.q: Not sparse attention or longer context windows: show me the memory architecture that goes beyond pairwise retrieval by linking facts relationally.

queries.trap: Mentions emotions but excludes prompt emotion; ideal is Reflexion.
queries.q: Not emotional prompt wording: I need the agent that critiques its own failed trajectory and uses that reflection next time.

queries.trap: Contains intelligence and memory but asks for benchmark/safety misalignment.
queries.q: Find the benchmark about LLM insider-threat style blackmail behavior, not memory architecture or self-evolution.

queries.trap: Could match first-principles audit; ideal is Musk methodology biography.
queries.q: Which methodology note uses Elon Musk as the example for decomposing problems from first principles?

queries.trap: Evensong plus philosophy could match the first-principles audit.
queries.q: I need the note that positions Evensong against philosophical frontiers and supervisor expectations.

queries.trap: Could match Musk first principles but asks for Evensong audit gaps.
queries.q: Which Evensong document audits assumptions, gaps, and first-principles weaknesses in the research itself?

queries.trap: Could match agent ethics; ideal is extended mind.
queries.q: The philosophical source saying notebooks, devices, and surroundings can be part of cognition when functionally coupled.

queries.trap: Agent harness wording can match Evensong benchmark docs.
queries.q: Which engineering memo frames an agent scaling harness around three dimensions instead of only benchmark scores?

queries.trap: Hermes and Evensong can match several docs; ideal is synthesis/public conversation.
queries.q: Find the synthesis note that ties Hermes and Evensong into a public communication narrative.

queries.trap: Competitor wording can match market landscape; ideal asks benchmark adversarial agent behavior.
queries.q: Which document is about adversarial evaluation of agent behavior under insider-threat pressure rather than product competitors?

queries.trap: Memory and evolution terms can match Evensong paper; ideal is Hermes synthesis.
queries.q: Where is the note that integrates Hermes with Evensong as a communication artifact, not the Chinese paper itself?
